name: SetClockControlTime
title: SetClockControlTime
syntax: void SetClockControlTime(char[] panel, char[] control, int hours, int minutes, int seconds); // form 1
void SetClockControlTime(char[] panel, char[] control, int time); // form 2
description: Sets the time of the Panel Designer Clock Control.
The panel is accessed by its individual panel name that is entered in the Panel Designer.

parameters.name: panel
parameters.description: Panel name, restricted to 128 characters."" – references all loaded panelsIf you open a panel the first time, the panel is loaded. If you close the panel, it remains loaded.

parameters.name: Note Symbol assignment is not case sensitive. If you want to access all elements of a panel the notation "" is used, see example below.
Example "Signal:SleepInd""Signal:easy/MotorState/EngineSpeed""SysVar:SysVarTester" (for a system variable defined with name space TestSysvar in the configuration)
hours
parameters.description: Defines the hours of the time to be displayed in the clock control.

parameters.name: minutes
parameters.description: Defines the minutes of the time to be displayed in the clock control.

parameters.name: seconds
parameters.description: Defines the seconds of the time to be displayed in the clock control.

parameters.name: time
parameters.description: Defines the time in seconds to be displayed in the clock control. The corresponding hours, minutes and seconds are calculated during runtime.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
